sourceTitle: geoBoundaries Syrian Arab Republic Administrative Boundaries

rawFiles.name: imports/raw/2026-06-27-geoboundaries-area/geoboundaries-syr-adm1-api.json
rawFiles.notes: geoBoundaries API metadata for Syria ADM1 gbOpen.

rawFiles.name: imports/raw/2026-06-27-geoboundaries-area/geoboundaries-syr-adm1.geojson
rawFiles.notes: Syria ADM1 boundary GeoJSON downloaded from geoBoundaries.

rawFiles.name: imports/raw/2026-06-27-geoboundaries-area/geoboundaries-syr-adm1-derived-areas.json
rawFiles.notes: Local derived area summary calculated from the ADM1 GeoJSON.

transforms: Downloaded geoBoundaries Syria ADM1 API metadata and boundary GeoJSON.
Matched the Damascus governorate feature by shapeISO SYR-DI.
Matched all governorate records to geoBoundaries ADM1 features by ISO subdivision code.
Stored geoBoundaries ADM1 shape IDs as external identifiers.
Calculated polygon area from GeoJSON coordinates with a spherical polygon area formula using mean Earth radius 6371008.8 metres.
Rounded the derived Damascus area to three decimal places in square kilometres.
reviewNotes: Used geoBoundaries for ADM1 shape IDs across all 14 governorates and for the missing Damascus area value so area coverage reaches 100%. Existing Wikidata area values were not replaced in this pass because they represent published measurements, while the Damascus value is explicitly boundary-derived.
